_comment_intent: Lighthouse CI gate for the public storefront. Initial target: /pricing only, which renders fully server-side without Supabase round-trips so the stub-env CI build can serve it cleanly. /orase/[citySlug] and /case-studies/[slug] DO hit Supabase for tenant + case-study data, which the stub envs (`https://localhost.invalid`) cannot satisfy — the first CI run failed there with ERRORED_DOCUMENT_REQUEST. Add them back behind a mock or staging URL when bandwidth allows. Thresholds stay at `warn` so we collect baseline runs before tightening to `error`.
